title: Permission card component for agent tool access requests
purpose: Displays tool access requests with status, input details, and permission controls. Shows danger warnings for bash commands and allows users to approve or deny requests.
module_context: Exports a PermissionCard React component that renders tool access requests with status badges, input previews, danger detection for bash commands, and permission action buttons.

steps.content: Map the status value to a corresponding color class for light and dark themes.
Render a span element with the appropriate styling and status text.
Initialize the remaining time countdown based on the deadline.
Set up a timer to update the remaining time every 500 milliseconds while the status is pending.
Extract the bash command from the input if the tool name is Bash.
Detect if the bash command is dangerous using the danger detection library.
Determine the deny reason from available fields in the item.
Render the card with status badge, input preview, and appropriate action controls.
